item.name: Living Lantern
item.description:
A living lantern has a number of uses, assuming one can keep it alive. After all, it only retains its lantern-like qualities while it is living, hence the name.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The soft, seemingly candlelit glow of this jellyfish has entranced the gaze of many a seafarer, bringing a sense of safety and contentment. As such, finding a living lantern in one's nets is considered an omen of good fortune amongst the fisherfolk of the Rothlyt Sound.
